Category

Family in Karlsruhe

Out and about with children in Karlsruhe

Attractions

Park
Free

City Centre West

Palace Gardens

English landscape park behind the palace with a botanical garden and tree stands more than a hundred years old.

Free entry
Park
Free

City Centre West

Botanical Garden Karlsruhe

A historic botanical garden next to the palace, with a complex of glasshouses and tropical plants.

Free entry
Museum

City Centre East

State Museum of Natural History

One of the largest natural history museums in Germany. A vivarium with live animals, dinosaur skeletons and a hall of minerals.

from 6 EUR
Park

City Centre East

Karlsruhe Zoological City Garden

A zoo right by the main station, merged with the city garden. One of the most beautiful zoo grounds in Germany.

from 12 EUR
Park
Free

City Centre East

City Garden

An English landscape park by the main station, combined with the zoo. Gondoletta boat rides and animal enclosures.

Free entry
Viewpoint
Free

Durlach

Turmberg Durlach

Karlsruhe's local mountain, home to Germany's oldest observation tower and the historic Turmbergbahn funicular.

Free entry
Park
Free

Nordstadt

Hardtwald Forest

A large forest area north of the city with hiking trails, game enclosures and picnic spots.

Free entry
Museum

Suedstadt

Transport Museum Karlsruhe

A private museum on Karlsruhe's transport history. Trams, railways, model railways and Karl Drais's running machine.

from 4 EUR

Restaurants

Badisch Brauhaus
Baden cuisine
€€

City Centre West

Badisch Brauhaus

Brewpub with its own brewery in the heart of Karlsruhe. Baden classics and house-brewed beer.
Vogelbraeu
Baden cuisine
€€

City Centre West

Vogelbraeu

Brewpub on Kapellenstrasse with its own beer and solid Baden-German cooking.
Brauhaus Kuehler Krug
Baden cuisine
€€

City Centre East

Brauhaus Kuehler Krug

Brewpub in the Stadtgarten with a beer garden under old trees. A summer classic for Karlsruhe.
Ristorante Lehners
Italian
€€

City Centre East

Ristorante Lehners

A classic Italian restaurant with wood-fired pizza and handmade pasta dishes.
Pizzeria Lo Stivale
Italian
€€

City Centre West

Pizzeria Lo Stivale

A cult pizzeria in Karlsruhe's west end with crispy pizza and a trattoria atmosphere.
Hanami
Japanese
€€

City Centre West

Hanami

A lively sushi restaurant with a conveyor belt and a large menu. Popular for lunch and with families.
Vapiano Karlsruhe
Italian
€€

City Centre West

Vapiano Karlsruhe

A front-cooking Italian on Europaplatz. Pasta and pizza prepared fresh to order.
L'Osteria Karlsruhe
Italian
€€

City Centre West

L'Osteria Karlsruhe

The XXL-pizza chain in Karlsruhe's city centre. Family-friendly and affordable.
Hans im Glueck
Burger
€€

City Centre West

Hans im Glueck

A burger chain with a Nordic birch-wood interior. A fairy-tale atmosphere and solid burgers.

Unvergessliche Erlebnisse für die ganze Familie: Touren, Ausflüge und Aktivitäten für Kinder und Erwachsene in und um Karlsruhe.

Karlsruhe interactive. Fan-shaped city, KIT, ZKM and the Federal Constitutional Court. Attractions, hotels, districts and tech news on one portal.
